use_codes.desc: THE TREATMENT OF CARCINOID SYNDROME DIARRHEA IN COMBINATION WITH SOMATOSTATIN ANALOG (SSA) THERAPY IN ADULTS INADEQUATELY CONTROLLED BY SSA THERAPY

indications.text:
Xermelo is indicated for the treatment of carcinoid syndrome diarrhea in combination with
somatostatin analog (SSA) therapy in adults inadequately controlled by SSA therapy.
